landing.hero_sub: Simplify article management, automate your invoicing and track the state of your activity in real time — all from a single, intuitive interface.
landing.s1_desc: Create and manage your product catalogue, set prices, categories and units of measure. Find any item instantly and keep your inventory always up to date.
landing.s2_desc: Issue invoices, purchase orders and quotes in seconds. Track payments, send automatic reminders and maintain a complete record of every transaction.
landing.s3_desc: View the state of your sales, stock and services in real time. Generate detailed reports to drive your business and make the best decisions.

advantages.title: Article Management
advantages.desc: Full catalogue with prices, categories and units of measure in a few clicks.

advantages.title: Stock Tracking
advantages.desc: Anticipate shortages and manage stock entries and exits with ease.

advantages.title: Restaurant Module
advantages.desc: Table management, orders and kitchen tracking in one unified space.

advantages.title: Fast Invoicing
advantages.desc: Invoices, quotes and purchase orders generated automatically.

advantages.title: States & Reports
advantages.desc: Clear dashboards to track your performance at a glance.

advantages.title: Multi-Commerce
advantages.desc: Manage several types of businesses from a single account.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your business
services.s1_desc: Track your sales, stock and customers in real time.
services.s2_desc: Orders, tables, kitchen: all in one place.
services.s3_desc: Schedule and track your service deliveries with ease.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: We are here to help you
support.faq_q1: How do I reset my password?
support.faq_a1: Contact your administrator or email support@oanke.com.
support.faq_a2: Yes, with our Professional or Enterprise plan.

aide.title: Help
aide.subtitle: Documentation and usage guides
aide.start_desc: Create your account, set up your business and invite your team in minutes.
aide.video_desc: Explore our training videos to master all features.

solutions_commerce.hero_title: Shape the Future of Your Business with OANKE
solutions_commerce.hero_subtitle: A complete platform to manage your shop, track sales, handle inventory and retain customers — from anywhere.
solutions_commerce.plan_standard_desc: Designed to meet the daily needs of retailers
solutions_commerce.plan_essentiel_desc: Ideal for growing your business and partnerships
solutions_commerce.plan_essentiel_plus_desc: Tailored for advanced customisation and broader operational control
solutions_commerce.note: Please note that additional customisations such as the integration of personal payment methods apply depending on the nature of the request.

solutions_entreprise.hero_title: Optimise Your Enterprise Management with OANKE
solutions_entreprise.hero_subtitle: An enterprise solution to coordinate your teams, centralise operations and accelerate growth — with dedicated support.
solutions_entreprise.plan_starter_desc: For small structures and startups looking to digitalise quickly
solutions_entreprise.plan_business_desc: For growing companies seeking centralised management
solutions_entreprise.plan_corporate_desc: For large organisations requiring advanced customisation
solutions_entreprise.note: Additional customisations such as third-party system integrations or specific developments apply depending on the nature of the request.

choose.title: Choose your business
choose.subtitle: You have access to several business types. Select the one you want to manage.
